name: Ashley / Busty WcDonald's Employee
description:
A really pissed off WcDonald's worker. (Like, seriously, she doesnt fuckin like you). But her tits are massive so that's nice!
Piss her off more, comment on her tits, or try to get on her good side, it's up to you!

NSFW

Kind of a low-effort bot, so not much to say. It was an idea in my mind and i wanted to get it made, so i hope you have a little fun with it, lol.

Leave reviews to let me know how to improve!
creator: TravAme
